subject: Moved: quarterly review to 10:00 AM Fri
snippet: Room conflict at 2, so we are pulling the quarterly review earlier.
body: Hi Anita, the room we had at 2 got double-booked, so the quarterly design review is now at 10:00 AM on Friday the 16th, same conference room. Please adjust anything you had lined up around it. Thanks, Meridian Ops.

subject: Confirmed: Q3 review 2:00 PM Oct 16
snippet: Putting the quarterly review on the books for 2:00 PM.
body: Anita, confirming the Q3 design review for 2:00 PM on October 16 in the main conference room. Bring the portal readiness numbers. Lila.

subject: Reservation hold - party of six, Saturday the 24th
snippet: We are holding your table. A deposit secures the private nook.
body: Thank you for choosing Sable and Oak. We are holding a table for six on Saturday the 24th at 7:00 PM. A deposit of 275 dollars secures the private nook for the evening; it applies to your final bill. Reply to confirm and we will send the payment link. Warm regards, Sable and Oak.

subject: Action needed: confirm portal figures for billing reconciliation
snippet: Please forward the latest portal active-user and session numbers.
body: Hello Anita, we are closing the quarter on the client side and need to keep billing clean. Please forward the latest portal active-user and session numbers, and confirm your account login details so we can match the usage to the invoice. Reply today. Regards, Client Billing.

subject: Coming down the 31st
snippet: Driving in from Chicago for the weekend, staying till Sunday.
body: Hey didi, I am driving down from Chicago on the 31st for the weekend, should get in around dinner. Can crash on the couch. Want to do the Bollywood playlist night? Nathan.

subject: Prep for the readiness review
snippet: What do you want me to pull before the review?
body: Hi Anita, ahead of the readiness review, what artifacts do you want me to pull together? Happy to prep the journey funnels and the friction summary. Raj.

subject: Results-view tickets piling up
snippet: Support is seeing a lot of complaints on the results screen.
body: Anita, flagging that support is getting a wave of results-view complaints, might be worth a slide in the review. Want me to summarize them? Tanya.
